g.text: caller | string | irq handler / timer cb
note | — | rounds up to next power-of-2
0x00 | struct page* | page — backing physical page
2 | get_page_from_freelist() | fast path: free pages exist
6 | writeback dirty pages | I/O — sleeps here
GFP_ATOMIC: skip steps 3-7, return NULL immediately
zeroed? | bool | NO — use kzalloc() for zero
action | code | use ptr directly in kernel code
when | GFP_KERNEL | reclaim exhausted all options
NEVER | rule | dereference NULL — kernel panic
ALWAYS | rule | check return value before use
ptr == NULL | safe | no-op (guaranteed by kernel)
double free | BUG() | kernel detects, oops
action | puts object back on slab freelist
TLB flush? | no | virtual mapping stays valid
zeroed? | no | data may linger (security note)
result | use-after-free → kernel oops or data corruption
fix | mutex_lock before any ptr read or write
